title: Polity Paper Series — Constitutional Commentary
purpose: The Polity Paper series is the interpretive, authoritative body of work underpinning the Polity. It is constitutional COMMENTARY — not ratified law — and the charters cross-reference it where their concepts (Proof of Work Potential, Proof of Time Saved, Time Sovereignty, Experience Sovereignty, and the rest of the series) are invoked. In the absence of a fully ratified concept paper, this commentary gives agents direction on constitutional compliance.
machineReadableNote: Human-readable PDFs live in the Qriptopian codex (Papers tab). Machine-readable markdown extractions live in codexes/packs/polity-core/items/commentary/ and are enumerated in `series[].papers[]` below. Regenerate via scripts/ingest-polity-papers.mjs.

proof_of_work_potential.definition: An estimate of the capability latent within truthful information before that capability is applied. PoWP estimates potential, not realized outcomes.
proof_of_work_potential.contributesFrom: Standing (veracity of declarations) plus the broader signal set defined in the Polity Paper series.
proof_of_work_potential.fullText: papers/polity (Polity Paper series) — see series[].papers[] once ingested.

proof_of_time_saved.definition: Verification of realized value, in three clearly-layered framings of one idea (no new primitives, no new ontology — just clearer layering): (1) PUBLIC MENTAL MODEL = Time-to-Value (instantly understood); (2) INTERNAL METRIC = Proof of Time Saved, PoTS (a measurable component); (3) CONSTITUTIONAL PRINCIPLE = Net Value Acceleration = Time-to-Value minus Risk Repair Burden (max(0, time saved − risk repair)). PoTS is ONE dimension of outcome accrual, not the whole story — an outcome claim also carries claimed value and a risk profile. Outcome claims are self-declared but accrue NOTHING to Standing until verified; verification is the accrual gate. PoTS improves the Polity's ability to understand how realized capability emerges from truthful information.
proof_of_time_saved.implementedAs: Outcome Accrual Evidence — the proofOfOutcomeClaims block on the VentureQube outcome layer (types/ventureQube.ts), verified via /api/venture/qubes/[ventureId]/verify-outcome, accrued into Personal Standing by services/venture/ventureOutcomeAccrual.ts.
proof_of_time_saved.fullText: papers/polity (Polity Paper series) — see series[].papers[] once ingested.

time_sovereignty.definition: The principle that an individual's time is theirs to direct — value accrues to those whose time and capability produced it, rather than being extracted by intermediaries.
time_sovereignty.fullText: papers/experience-sovereignty + papers/coyn-thesis — see series[].papers[] once ingested.

experience_sovereignty.definition: The principle that operators own and direct their experience — its model, its data, and its progression — rather than surrendering it to an extractive platform.

series.title: Experience Sovereignty Series
series.description: Foundational papers on experience sovereignty and the operator's ownership of their experience model and progression.

series.title: COYN Thesis Series
series.description: The COYN thesis — the economic and value-accrual foundations of the Polity.

series.title: The Polity Series
series.description: The constitutional foundation of the Agentic Polity. The fourth paper, 'The Constitution of the Agentic Polity', is elevated to ratified constitutional status (see constitution-agentic-polity.v1.json).

constitutionalPaper.title: The Constitution of the Agentic Polity

papers.title: 4 The Constitution of the Agentic Polity
